subject: WM-0166 review: changes_requested
body: High: the 10-minute Worker-owned scheduler gate is not proven. The real Chromium Worker smoke stops at tick >=9, while the 18000-tick command is headless explicit stepping; the report itself states no browser/Worker ran for 600 wall-clock seconds, so continuous scheduler survival/cadence/backpressure over the required interval remains unverified. High: the moving/working visibility gate fails in current behavior. The scheduler advances 3 ticks per publication; GameSessionJobLifecycle sets moving then working within tick 0 and completes by tick 3. An independent runtime probe observed tick 0 all idle and tick 3+ completed/idle, with no moving or working projection in any publication. Do not lower either gate; route a product/runtime repair plus focused Worker/Web evidence. Other required gates pass, including 100000-tick zero leaks, parity, coherent 8-resident/resource/alert/detail basis, fixture isolation, schema-v3 fail-closed, inventory, Web 13/13, Worker 18/18 and quality 458/458. Reviewer exact 'corepack pnpm exec vitest' failed twice to resolve vitest, but the installed direct Vitest entry passed the same 4 files 40/40.
